message: Hi luv, welcome uh to another day of pouring my heart to you. I want you to know that there will be days when u dont feel good, u dont wish to talk to anyone or you just feel empty. Dont worry. Take ur time and remember that no matter what Im there. There will be peopple who will wish to know how you feel like when you will fail, dont worry I promise to be by your side and never let them know. I wish and pray for ur success equally(at times more than me) to be that star that keeps it shine forever. Just be you. You are complete. No changes , No ammendments. You the best human I know. Looovvvviiiiiuuuu baby !!!! Ya yet another day of crushing, loving and missing you more.
